lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around did, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: [Mohiam] You chose to train him in the Way, in defiance of our rule.
lakeStrings.subject: chose
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around chose, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.subject: our
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around our, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: He had to be tested to the limits.
lakeStrings.subject: had
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around had, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: So much potential, wasted in a male.
lakeStrings.subject: male
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around male, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: You were told to bear only daughters.
lakeStrings.subject: bear
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around bear, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: But you, in your pride, thought you could produce the Kwisatz Haderach.
lakeStrings.subject: but
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around but, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.subject: was
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around was, with negative tone.
